SetValue(count,count+1) SetValue(isNew,true) SetValue(hsmc,RandomElement(lbhsmc)) SetValue(numa,RandomElement(lbfm)) SetValue(txtSel,"") SetValue(isTiShi,false) SetValue(txtVerIf,"选择答案后点“验证”") SetBackgroundColor(cosz0,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz5,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz6,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz7,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz8,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz9,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz10,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz11,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(cosz12,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz0,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz5,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinz6,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinf1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinf2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinf3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinf4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinf5,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(sinf6,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz0,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz5,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tan6,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf5,"蓝绿")

SetValue(txtVerIf,If(isRight,"答对了，你真棒！","别泄气，再选一次！")) SetValue(lbResults,Append(lbResults,{LaTeX(count), LaTeX(showa), LaTeX(Object(txtSel)), LaTeX(isRight)})) SetValue(numTrue,If(isRight&&isNew,numTrue+1,numTrue)) SetValue(txtResults,LaTeX("$问题数："+count+"\\正确数："+numTrue+"\\正确率："+numTrue/count*100+"%$",true,true)) SetValue(isNew,false)

input.a0: Join[{If[fm12, lbfm12, {}], If[fm6, lbfm6, {}], If[fm4, lbfm4, {}]}]

ggbscript.val: SetBackgroundColor(tanz0,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanz5,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tan6,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf1,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf2,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf3,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf4,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(tanf5,"蓝绿") SetBackgroundColor(%0,"红色") SetValue(txtSel,Name(%0))
